_status: BOOTSTRAP — NOT PRODUCTION-SIGNED. The oci_digest_at_v0_3_cut / slsa_provenance_digest_at_v0_3_cut placeholder values below are filled at the v0.3.0-rc1 release-tag-cut ceremony (release.yml step 8a); see _tuf_root/README.md. The C18 marker gate (tests/test_synthetic_c18_marker_gate.py) fails closed on these placeholders under REQUIRE_C18_HARDENING=1 until the ceremony runs.
role_separation_note: Separate TUF role from the C18 release role; under the C18 TUF feed but distinct `targets` entry. Plugin allowlist rotation is decoupled from release cadence — adding a plugin requires bump-+-resign-+-publish ceremony per the Pass-1 tightening item 11 disposition.
comment_cv5_disposition: Closes Pass-1 CV5 (runtime-loaded plugins outside OCI digest). Each plugin is shipped as an OCI artifact pinned by digest, cosign-signed with Fulcio cert, SLSA-3 attested, AND admitted ONLY when present in this TUF-signed allowlist. The c18_plugin_oci_loader.py module (c18-016) consumes this file.
registry_org_allowlist_disposition: Hard-coded to ghcr.io/nexiverify/. Adding another registry/org requires bumping this allowlist and re-signing it under the plugin-allowlist TUF role. The c18_plugin_oci_loader.py module refuses to load on a registry-org mismatch (raises PLUGIN_REGISTRY_ORG_NOT_ALLOWLISTED).

spec_sha_pin.purpose: Validates referenced spec SHA pins against the manifest-declared values (V-Kernel Phase-1 substrate plugin)

three_set_sum_invariant.purpose: Three-set-sum invariant verifier (98x perf-optimized per memory project_three_set_sum_invariant_hoist_2026_05_14)

dispatch_record_wellformed.purpose: Validates dispatch records are structurally well-formed (V-Kernel substrate plugin)

stamp_lattice.purpose: Stamp lattice ordering verifier (V-Kernel substrate plugin)

refinement_discharge.purpose: Refinement discharge proof verifier (V-Kernel substrate plugin)

file_integrity_many_small.purpose: File integrity verifier optimized for many small files (V-Kernel substrate plugin; §C9 strict-SHA path)

source_attributes_consistency.purpose: Source attributes consistency verifier (V-Kernel substrate plugin)

honest_hedge: v0.3 ships the allowlist STRUCTURE — TUF role separation, 10 V-Kernel substrate plugins enumerated with their cosign claim identities, registry org hard-pinned to ghcr.io/nexiverify/. The actual OCI digest + SLSA provenance digest fields are filled at release-tag-cut by .github/workflows/release.yml step 8a (c18-007 + this c18-010 addition); pre-cut they carry the TBD-FILLED-BY-RELEASE-YML-STEP-8A sentinel. The c18_plugin_oci_loader.py module (c18-016) fail-closes when it encounters TBD sentinels in production mode.
dev_mode_bypass_note: Direct-import path (`--allow-direct-import` CLI flag in c18-016) is dev-only. PRODUCTION verifier runs (the OCI image built by c18-001 flake) hard-fail on direct imports per CV5 disposition.
